power_pitcher.name: Power Pitcher
power_pitcher.description: High velocity generates strikeouts. Blows fastballs past hitters with elite whiff rates.
power_pitcher.pitch_reasoning: Fastball (velocity+presence) as zone anchor. Splitter (velocity+stuff+presence) as elite chase/whiff pitch. Slider (velocity+control) as breaking putaway.
power_pitcher.guide_notes: Community guide maps this to Control/Rotation axis. Velocity pairs well with Control builds. Splitter and Slider are strong Control/Rotation pitches.

control_artist.name: Control Artist
control_artist.description: Elite command keeps runners off base. Minimizes walks and hit batters with pinpoint accuracy.
control_artist.pitch_reasoning: Fastball and cutter for high zone rates (command pitches). Slider and changeup as breaking/offspeed mix. 4-pitch arsenal for sequencing variety.

groundball_machine.name: Groundball Machine
groundball_machine.description: Induces ground balls with elite stuff. Turns batters into double play candidates.
groundball_machine.pitch_reasoning: Sinker (highest GB rate) and knuckle-curve (high GB + stuff pitch) as primary. Changeup (lowest BABIP) and splitter (2nd highest GB) for variety. All are strong Stuff pitches.
groundball_machine.guide_notes: Community guide maps this to Accuracy/Stuff axis. Knuckle Curve and Sinker are primary Accuracy/Stuff pitches with high GB rates.

deception_master.name: Deception Master
deception_master.description: Freezes batters with elite deception. Gets called strikes as hitters watch pitches go by.
deception_master.pitch_reasoning: Changeup and curveball freeze hitters (breaking). Slider for chase. Fastball as fast-pitch contrast to make offspeed more deceptive. Speed differential is key.

workhorse_starter.name: Workhorse Starter
workhorse_starter.description: Innings eater with stamina and guts. Goes deep into games and stays effective late.
workhorse_starter.pitch_reasoning: Fastball as fast-pitch anchor. Cutter (rotation+control) for weak contact. Slider and changeup as breaking/offspeed variety. 4-pitch mix conserves stamina through variety.

damage_control.name: Damage Control Pitcher
damage_control.description: Control and stuff limit extra base hits. When contact happens, it goes nowhere.
damage_control.pitch_reasoning: Splitter (elite chase rate + GB) and changeup (lowest BABIP) as primary Control/Stuff pitches. Cutter and slider as secondary options. All generate weak contact.
damage_control.guide_notes: Community guide maps this to Control/Stuff axis. Splitter and Changeup are primary Control/Stuff pitches. Cutter, Slider, and KC are secondary options.

chase_specialist.name: Chase Rate Specialist
chase_specialist.description: Gets batters to fish with persuasion and guts. Expands the zone effectively.
chase_specialist.pitch_reasoning: Slider (control+persuasion secondary) and cutter (persuasion primary) as zone-expansion pitches. Changeup as offspeed chase pitch. Fastball sets up the breaking/offspeed chase pitches.

elite_reliever.name: Elite Reliever
elite_reliever.description: Maximum dominance over short stints. Velocity and stuff for 1-2 inning dominance.
elite_reliever.pitch_reasoning: Fastball (velocity+presence) for velocity dominance. Splitter (velocity+stuff) for elite whiff rate. Sweeper (velocity+rotation+deception) leverages deception stat for weak contact. Tight 3-pitch mix maximizes short-stint dominance.

breaking_ball_specialist.name: Breaking Ball Specialist
breaking_ball_specialist.description: Masters curveball and slider with elite rotation. Spin dominates hitters.
breaking_ball_specialist.pitch_reasoning: Curveball, slider, and sweeper as breaking ball trio. Fastball as necessary fast-pitch contrast — speed differential makes breaking balls more effective.

iron_man.name: Iron Man
iron_man.description: Defiance and guts keep you in games. Refuses to be knocked out.
iron_man.pitch_reasoning: Fastball and sinker for fast-pitch base. Slider and changeup for breaking/offspeed. 4-pitch arsenal spreads workload across pitch types for durability.

balanced_starter.name: Balanced Starter
balanced_starter.description: Well-rounded pitcher with no major weaknesses. Adapts to any situation.
balanced_starter.pitch_reasoning: Fastball (fast, zone). Slider and changeup (breaking/offspeed, whiffs). Curveball for additional breaking variety. Balanced 4-pitch mix adapts to any lineup.

knuckleball_artist.name: Knuckleball Artist
knuckleball_artist.description: Unpredictable with knuckle-curve focus. Movement and deception over power.
knuckleball_artist.pitch_reasoning: Knuckle-curve as primary (high GB rate + unique movement). Changeup for lowest BABIP. Sweeper for breaking variety. Sinker as fast-pitch contrast with GB upside.

analytical_pitcher.name: Analytical Pitcher
analytical_pitcher.description: Intuition-based approach with smart pitch sequencing. For future meta when intuition is buffed.
analytical_pitcher.pitch_reasoning: Changeup and curveball for deception. Sweeper (rotation+deception) as breaking ball that leverages deception stat. Slider for chase variety. Sequencing-heavy approach relies on speed changes.

six_pitch_arsenal.name: Six-Pitch Arsenal
six_pitch_arsenal.description: Masters many pitches with balanced stats. Unpredictable and versatile.
six_pitch_arsenal.pitch_reasoning: Full 6-pitch arsenal: FF and SI as fast base. SL, CH, CU as breaking/offspeed trio. FC bridges fast and breaking. Maximum unpredictability through variety.

zone_commander.name: Zone Commander
zone_commander.description: Accuracy and rotation focus with elite zone rate. Pounds the strike zone with deceptive breaking balls.
zone_commander.pitch_reasoning: Sweeper (low zone contact, deception synergy) as primary. Knuckle-curve (accuracy+stuff) for GB/breaking variety. Slider and curveball complete the breaking ball arsenal. All are Accuracy/Rotation pitches.
zone_commander.guide_notes: Community guide maps this to Accuracy/Rotation axis. Deception pairs well with Accuracy builds. Sweeper, Knuckle Curve, Slider, Curveball are primary Accuracy/Rotation pitches.

deception_junkballer.name: Deception Junkballer
deception_junkballer.description: Wins with elite deception and control despite minimal velocity. Based on S10's Agnes Kose (Velocity 90, Deception 445, 0.19 ERA).
deception_junkballer.pitch_reasoning: Changeup (rotation, lowest BABIP) and curveball (presence, highest CSW) maximize deception without velocity. Slider adds chase rate. Knuckle-curve (stuff+accuracy) as movement pitch. No fastball needed.

fastball_command.name: Fastball Command
fastball_command.description: Elite velocity paired with pinpoint accuracy. Blows fastballs by hitters with precise location. Based on S10 velocity leaders like Penelope Holder (Velocity 665, Control 330).
fastball_command.pitch_reasoning: All fastball variants — four-seam for velocity, cutter for lateral movement, sinker for downward action. Pure fastball arsenal located precisely.

persuasion_specialist.name: Persuasion Specialist
persuasion_specialist.tagline: Expand the zone, fool the ump
persuasion_specialist.description: Elite persuasion gets borderline calls and expands the zone. Combined with accuracy for untouchable command. Based on S10 pitchers like Yara Laurent (Persuasion 265, Accuracy 360).
persuasion_specialist.pitch_reasoning: Fastball and cutter paint corners. Slider and changeup as offspeed options that look like strikes but aren't. 4-pitch mix maximizes zone deception.

guts_monster.name: Guts Monster
guts_monster.description: Extreme guts investment overpowers hitters through pure mental toughness. Based on S10 players like Patrick Park (Guts 955).
guts_monster.pitch_reasoning: Fastball as primary with guts boosting effectiveness. Slider and splitter as putaway pitches. Simple arsenal maximized by raw guts.

intuition_reader.name: Intuition Reader
intuition_reader.description: Uses Season 10 intuition and deception to outsmart hitters. Anticipates batter tendencies and exploits weaknesses with pitch sequencing.
intuition_reader.pitch_reasoning: Changeup and knuckle curve exploit deception. Slider for breaking sequence. Fastball to establish timing that deception disrupts.
